Title: On .NET Live - Make your first NuGet library with .NET 10 and AI
Description:
Wei Lin is here to show us how to use .NET 10 single-file scripting capabilities, GitHub, and Copilot to develop the first open-source and free Office-to-PDF conversion library on NuGet.

🔗 Featuring: Wei Lin, Scott Addie, Frank Boucher, Cam Soper

#dotnet #dotnetdeveloper #ai
Author: dotnet
